generated_oml:
instance MABIMAX100SensorSystem : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors in MABI MAX 100 robot providing time series data for motion control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorMQTTStream
]

instance RobotSensorMQTTStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MABIMAX100SensorSystem
]

instance RobotSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time series sensor data streamed via MQTT from MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorMQTTStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler, ACMEEnabler, AADLEnabler, MontiArcEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, CppEnabler, JavaEnabler, RFLPEnabler, OOSEMEnabler, SPESEnabler, SMArDTEnabler
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Integrated Block Diagrams for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLStateMachineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML state machines for behavioral modeling of robot axes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton model for robot behavioral dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcEnabler
]

instance SimulinkAnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink model for multi-physics friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML (version 1.7) for structural and behavioral modeling using IBDs and state machines"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance ACMEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language for component and interface modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL for modeling real-time embedded systems architecture"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MontiArcEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavioral modeling of robot components"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for analytical simulations of robot motion dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance CppEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language for code-based implementation of digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance JavaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java programming language for code-based implementation of digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance RFLPEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP methodology for multi-level abstraction (requirements, functional, logical, physical layers)"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance OOSEMEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OOSEM methodology for object-oriented systems engineering modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SPESEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SPES methodology for embedded systems engineering"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SMArDTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SMArDT methodology for coordinated modeling of digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous, multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard-based visualization service for robot motion accuracy insights"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance JointFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction for enhancing robot motion accuracy"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of robot motion accuracy metrics via dashboard"
]

instance MABIMAX100Robot : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Serial robot MABI MAX 100 with six axes controlled by Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller"
]

instance FirstAxisMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance FirstAxisGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearbox in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance RobotPhysicalEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment of MABI MAX 100 robot system"
    base:contains MABIMAX100Robot, FirstAxisMotor, FirstAxisGearbox
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system's architecture is defined by a UML-based Digital Shadow Reference Model (Fig. 1) comprising components such as Processing (for data processing and aggregation), Asset (representing the physical entity), and Model (simulation model). Section IV.B details the concrete integration where these components interact through specific relationships to form the digital shadow structure, ensuring coordinated data flow and system-wide orchestration."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for streaming time series sensor data from physical to virtual components."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems utilizes Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for interoperability, MQTT protocol for data streaming, and interfaces with the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl control system to enable real-time data exchange and system coordination."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems-Engineering (MBSE) uses SysML during development, and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) are referenced for compliance with industry standards."
]
